##RRUFFID=R150032
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_5_Al_2_(AsO_4_)_4_(OH)_4_·12H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Jote mine, Pampa Larga district, Tierra Amarilla, Copiapo´ Province, Atacama Region, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Pale yellow or pale blue to clear bladed crystals.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
